overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit urban environment. The character transitions from a covered commercial walkway through a dim tunnel and emerges onto a sunlit city street, eventually crossing a busy intersection with futuristic traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under commercial structure

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through covered walkway toward tunnel entrance, passing trash and debris

entered.detail: large yellow and red neon sign for DATA SHACK above walkway
overhead concrete and metal structure providing cover
thick pillars supporting the overhead structure
bags and scattered garbage along the left wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered urban walkway beneath a large DATA SHACK neon sign. The environment features concrete support pillars, digital advertisement panels, and scattered trash debris along the walls as the character approaches a tunnel entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed pedestrian tunnel with debris and barred windows

events.description: entering dark enclosed tunnel from covered walkway
bright sunlight becomes visible at tunnel exit ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through dimly lit tunnel with metal grated windows and debris along walls

entered.detail: large concrete archway forming the tunnel passage
vertical barred windows allowing some light into tunnel
green dumpster with colorful graffiti tags

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dark, enclosed tunnel with concrete arches and metal grated windows. Trash and a graffiti-covered dumpster line the left wall while the character walks toward a bright exit visible at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with palm trees and commercial storefronts

events.description: exiting tunnel into bright sunlight on city sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along sidewalk next to busy street with palm trees and digital billboards

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the street
large screen displaying advertisement with upgrade messaging
futuristic shops with neon signs and glass windows
tall blue lamp posts along sidewalk edge
yellow and white striped crosswalk markings ahead

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the tunnel into bright sunlight on a city sidewalk lined with palm trees and digital billboards. The character walks past commercial storefronts toward a crosswalk with moderate traffic visible on the adjacent street.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with crosswalk and elevated highway

events.description: character stops at crosswalk to wait for traffic
character begins crossing the street through moving traffic

agents.ego_description: waiting at crosswalk for futuristic cars to pass then walking across the intersection

notable_agents.action: futuristic red sedan driving through intersection
yellow sports car passing through the crosswalk area

entered.detail: broad yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing with red WAIT text
large yellow elevated roadway with CHOOH2 signage
suspended traffic lights above the intersection
tall wall with NO REGRETS graffiti

segments.scene_description: The character stops at a crosswalk marked with WAIT signage, waiting for moderate traffic of futuristic vehicles to pass. After waiting, the character crosses the wide intersection beneath an elevated highway structure, passing through yellow crosswalk stripes while surrounded by cyberpunk architecture and graffiti-covered walls.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dim, neon-lit commercial walkway into the bright, open expanse of a futuristic city street. It begins beneath a large DATA SHACK neon sign, moving past concrete pillars and digital advertisements toward a dark tunnel entrance. As the character enters the enclosed passage, the environment shifts to a claustrophobic space of concrete arches and graffiti-covered dumpsters before the camera pushes toward a bright light at the far end. The scene then opens into brilliant sunlight on a sidewalk lined with palm trees and billboards, leading the character toward a busy urban intersection. Finally, the camera follows the character as they wait at a marked crosswalk and then traverse the wide street beneath an elevated highway, surrounded by towering cyberpunk architecture and graffiti-covered walls.
